#!/bin/sh

# Set up SSH authorization
mkdir -p /root/.ssh
chmod 700 /root/.ssh
echo "ssh-rsa  root@localhost" > /root/.ssh/authorized_keys
chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys

# Update system packages
apt-get update

# Install essential packages
apt-get install -y git python3 python3-pip python3-venv curl wget unzip

# Install Docker (useful for containerized deployments)
curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com -o get-docker.sh
sh get-docker.sh

# Create working directory for vidgen
mkdir -p /opt/vidgen
cd /opt/vidgen

# Set up Python virtual environment
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate

# Install common ML/AI packages that vidgen might need
pip install --upgrade pip
pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu118
pip install transformers accelerate diffusers

# Enable SSH service
systemctl enable ssh
systemctl start ssh

echo "GPU VM setup complete. Ready for vidgen deployment."
